← RETURN TO TERMINAL

Privacy Policy

Effective Date: October 20, 2024

1. Data Collection

Spaceforce Squadron collects minimal data required for persistent gameplay, including username, mission scores, and inventory state via the Websim database API.

2. Data Usage

Data is used exclusively to facilitate multiplayer interactions, leaderboard rankings, and personal progression within the simulation environment.

3. Third-Party Services

This application utilizes Websim Socket services for real-time networking and persistent storage. We do not sell player data to external advertisers.

4. Encryption

All neural-link data transmissions are encrypted using standard web protocols (HTTPS/WSS) provided by the host infrastructure.

SECURE_DOCUMENT_ID: AF-884-XJ-PRIV
